title: TNT Slimes
description: Adds a slime that contains a block of TNT
body:
Ever wondered what would happen to a slime when it ingested a tnt block? Well, prepare for slime-splosions! This mod will adds slimes which have ingested a tnt block and will try to blow you up, dealing a fair amount of damage to players, mobs, and other entities. The spawn rate of the TNT Slime's can be changed in the config.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
